creator: rfg@tristatelogic.com
text:
The current smplayer port (14.3.0) has a Makefile which causes this
port to be dependent upon the multimedia/mplayer port.

I do believe that it would be vastly better to have the smplayer port be
dependent upon the more current multimedia/mplayer2 port.

Fix: 

Should be obvious, I think, but what do I know?
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/multimedia/smplayer
fgrep RUN_DEPENDS Makefile
